title: Skill System Architecture
brief: A technical architecture diagram showing the Skill System three-layer progressive disclosure mechanism, metadata-driven trigger system, and runtime execution flow. Use modular boxes, clean arrows, and bilingual labels to show: 1) metadata scanning, 2) progressive loading (summary -> full), 3) script execution with uv run, 4) references/ directory. Clean professional tech diagram style.
